mapper.sql: wb.id, wb.user_id, wb.amount, wb.start_date, wb.end_date, wb.update_count, COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(t.amount) FROM `transaction` t WHERE t.user_id = wb.user_id AND t.type = 2 AND t.`date` BETWEEN wb.start_date AND wb.end_date ), 0) AS spent_money
mapper.select: SELECT FROM weekly_budget wb WHERE wb.user_id = #{userId} AND CURDATE() BETWEEN wb.start_date AND wb.end_date LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM weekly_budget wb WHERE wb.user_id = #{userId} AND wb.start_date <= CURDATE() ORDER BY wb.start_date DESC LIMIT 4
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO weekly_budget (user_id, amount, start_date, end_date) VALUES (#{userId}, #{amount}, #{startDate}, #{endDate})
mapper.update: UPDATE weekly_budget SET amount = #{amount}, update_count = update_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM weekly_budget wb WHERE wb.user_id = #{userId} AND #{date} BETWEEN wb.start_date AND wb.end_date LIMIT 1
